name: bnsql
description: SQL interface to Binary Ninja databases for querying and CRUD operations on functions, xrefs, strings, types, and decompiled code

interface.shortDescription: Reverse engineering skills for BNSQL-driven Binary Ninja workflows
interface.longDescription: Adds a namespaced BNSQL skill set for reverse engineering, decompilation, annotations, type recovery, and SQL-driven analysis inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Start a BNSQL session and orient the database.
